description_long: This object is an open book with a three-dimensional pop-up scene on the right page, depicting a snowy landscape with a Christmas tree, icy cliffs, and a wintry background. The left page is mostly blank with a subtle snowy texture and a red-and-white striped bookmark or ribbon hanging down. A large, ornate metallic key is inserted into the top of the book, adding a whimsical and fantastical element. The book's cover and pages have a weathered, vintage appearance, with brown and gold tones dominating the exterior. The pop-up scene is intricately detailed, with layered paper elements creating depth and a sense of immersion. The overall design suggests a magical or holiday-themed storybook, likely intended for decorative or interactive use.
description: An open vintage book with a detailed pop-up snowy scene, a striped ribbon, and a large ornate key inserted at the top. The design is whimsical and holiday-themed, with layered paper elements and a weathered cover.
description_view_0: The book is open, showing the pop-up snowy scene with a Christmas tree and icy cliffs on the right, and a blank left page with a striped ribbon.
description_view_1: A side view highlighting the thickness of the book and the protruding pop-up elements, with the striped ribbon visible on the left.
description_view_2: The open book is seen from the opposite angle, emphasizing the pop-up scene and the large key at the top, with the left page and ribbon also visible.
description_view_3: A side view from the left, showing the depth of the pop-up scene and the striped ribbon hanging from the left page.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a three-dimensional pop-up illustration of a snowy landscape with a Christmas tree, icy cliffs, and a wintry background. The scene is whimsical and detailed, evoking a magical, holiday-themed atmosphere.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark brown with a textured, weathered appearance and no visible text or decorative elements. The design is simple and blends with the vintage look of the cover.
